color.neutral.100: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 100: subtle container fill — banner & toast backgrounds. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.200: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 200: pressed/selected container fill, faint borders. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.300: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 300: dividers, disabled outlines, decorative strokes. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.400: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 400: placeholder text on light surfaces, muted icons. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.500: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 500: base value — default fills, accents, primary action color. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.600: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 600: hover state for 500 (slightly darker). Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.700: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 700: pressed/active state for 500. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.800: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 800: high-emphasis fills and text on light backgrounds. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.900: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 900: headings and high-contrast text on light surfaces. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
color.neutral.950: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 950: maximum contrast — display copy, hero text, icons. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.

surface.default: Page background. The lowest-elevation surface — fills the screen behind everything.
surface.container: Card / sheet surface. One step above the page background; use for cards, panels, list rows.
surface.inverse: Inverted surface. Use sparingly for contrast moments (footers, dark callouts) on light themes.
surface.overlay: Overlay surface. Background for modals, popovers, and floating panels above the page.
surface.tint: Tinted surface. Subtle brand-tinted background for emphasis blocks and notification bars.
primary.default: Default primary CTA fill. Use on primary buttons, key links, and the most important action on a screen.
primary.on: Foreground color (text/icons) for content placed on primary/default. Always meets AA contrast.
primary.container: Tonal primary CTA background. Use for soft buttons, chips, badges that share the primary color family.
primary.on-container: Foreground color for content on primary/container.
primary.hover: Hover state of primary/default. Apply on pointer enter.
primary.pressed: Pressed/active state of primary/default. Apply during click/tap.
secondary.default: Default secondary CTA fill. Use on primary buttons, key links, and the most important action on a screen.
secondary.on: Foreground color (text/icons) for content placed on secondary/default. Always meets AA contrast.
secondary.container: Tonal secondary CTA background. Use for soft buttons, chips, badges that share the secondary color family.
secondary.on-container: Foreground color for content on secondary/container.
secondary.hover: Hover state of secondary/default. Apply on pointer enter.
secondary.pressed: Pressed/active state of secondary/default. Apply during click/tap.
tertiary.default: Default tertiary CTA fill. Use on primary buttons, key links, and the most important action on a screen.
tertiary.on: Foreground color (text/icons) for content placed on tertiary/default. Always meets AA contrast.
tertiary.container: Tonal tertiary CTA background. Use for soft buttons, chips, badges that share the tertiary color family.
tertiary.on-container: Foreground color for content on tertiary/container.
tertiary.hover: Hover state of tertiary/default. Apply on pointer enter.
tertiary.pressed: Pressed/active state of tertiary/default. Apply during click/tap.
content.primary: Primary text. Headings and key body copy. Highest-contrast on-surface text.
content.secondary: Secondary text. Subtitles, supporting copy, deemphasized body.
content.tertiary: Tertiary text. Captions, helper text, metadata, timestamps.
content.disabled: Disabled text and icons. Indicates a control is non-interactive.
content.inverse: Text on inverse / dark surfaces. Pair with surface/inverse.
content.link: Inline link text. Underline on hover.
content.on-primary: Text on primary action surfaces. Pair with primary/default.
content.on-secondary: Text on secondary action surfaces. Pair with secondary/default.
content.on-tertiary: Text on tertiary action surfaces. Pair with tertiary/default.
content.on-surface: Default text on surface backgrounds. Equivalent to content/primary in most cases.
content.on-inverse: Text on inverse surfaces. Pair with surface/inverse.
border.default: Default border. 1px hairline for cards, dividers, and inputs at rest.
border.strong: Stronger border. Use to outline emphasized containers and group separators.
border.subtle: Subtle hairline divider. Inside lists and grouped settings.
border.brand: Brand-colored border. Use for selected states and focused inputs.
border.focus: Focus ring. Apply on keyboard focus for accessibility.
border.interactive: Border for interactive elements at rest (buttons, toggles).
status.success: Success accent. Use on icons, badges, success alerts, completion ticks.
status.success-on: Foreground on success accent (e.g. text on a green pill).
status.success-container: Soft success background. Banners, completed-state cards.
status.success-on-container: Foreground for content inside success containers.
status.warning: Warning accent. Caution icons, unsaved-changes badges.
status.warning-container: Soft warning background. Cautionary banners and alerts.
status.warning-on-container: Foreground for content inside warning containers.
status.error: Error/danger accent. Destructive icons, error badges, validation messages.
status.error-container: Soft error background. Error banners and danger cards.
status.error-on-container: Foreground for content inside error containers.
status.info: Informational accent. Neutral info icons and tags.
status.info-container: Soft info background. Informational banners and tips.
status.info-on-container: Foreground for content inside info containers.
interaction.hover: Generic hover overlay. Layer on top of any surface to indicate hover.
interaction.pressed: Generic pressed overlay. Layer on top of any surface to indicate active press.
interaction.focus-ring: Focus ring overlay. Used by border/focus, exposed for non-border focus indicators.
interaction.selected: Selected state background. List items, table rows, segmented controls.
interaction.selected-subtle: Subtle selected background. Use when full selected feels too loud.
interaction.dragged: Dragged state overlay. Apply to items being dragged.
fixed.white: Always white, regardless of theme. Use only when a fixed value is essential (logos on dark images).
fixed.dim-overlay: Dim scrim behind modals and bottom sheets. Theme-independent.
color.neutral.50: Neutral grays for surfaces, text, and borders. Neutral 50: lightest tint — page background washes, soft hover surfaces. Primitive — reference via semantic tokens (surface/*, primary/*, status/*) instead of using directly in components.
font-family: Active language for localized strings. Switch modes to localize the entire file.
font.size.40: Font size 40px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
space.4: Tightest gap. Icon-to-label spacing, dense list rows.
space.8: Compact gap. Chip padding, button icon offset, tag inner spacing.
space.12: Small gap. Small button padding, tight stack rhythm.
space.16: Default unit. Card padding, list row inset, default stack rhythm.
space.20: Medium gap. Form field row spacing, section sub-stacks.
space.24: Section padding. Card outer padding, modal body inset.
space.32: Large section gap. Between major content blocks on a screen.
space.40: Large block separation. Hero internal padding.
space.44: Touch target row height. Bottom-bar item spacing.
space.48: Big section gap. Between unrelated content groups.
space.2: Hairline gap. Inline icon offsets, fine optical adjustments.
radius.none: Squared corners. Tables, code blocks, full-bleed media.
radius.xs: Tight 2px radius. Tags, badges, dense chips.
radius.sm: Small 4px radius. Inputs, small buttons, tooltips.
radius.md: Default 8px radius. Buttons, cards, form fields, dropdowns.
radius.xl: XL 16px radius. Bottom sheets, large cards, hero tiles.
radius.2xl: 2xl 20px radius. Feature cards, illustrated promo tiles.
radius.full: Pill / fully rounded. Avatars, FABs, segmented controls, status dots.
border.none: No border. Use to remove a border via tokens.
border.thin: 1px hairline. Default for inputs, cards, dividers.
border.thick: 3px border. Loud emphasis: highlighted cards, illustrative outlines.
size.icon.xs: Icon XS (12px). Inline metadata icons (timestamps, badges).
size.icon.sm: Icon SM (16px). Default body-text icon. Inputs, list items.
size.icon.md: Icon MD (20px). Default UI icon. Buttons, nav items, headers.
size.icon.lg: Icon LG (24px). Section header icons, large list items.
size.icon.xl: Icon XL (32px). Hero icons, empty-state illustrations.
size.icon.2xl: Icon 2XL (40px). Feature icons, splash screens, oversized illustrations.
size.avatar.xs: Mini avatar (24px). Comment threads, dense lists.
size.avatar.sm: Small avatar (32px). Inline mentions, list rows.
size.avatar.md: Default avatar (40px). User menus, list items.
size.avatar.lg: Large avatar (56px). Profile cards, contact rows.
size.avatar.2xl: XL avatar (96px). Profile screens, share modals.
size.touch-target: Minimum 44px touch target. Honor for every tappable element to meet WCAG.
size.button.sm: Small button — dense toolbars and inline actions.
size.button.md: Default button — primary CTAs and form submits.
size.button.lg: Large button — hero CTAs and onboarding.
size.input.sm: Compact input — toolbars and inline edits.
opacity.0: Fully transparent. Hidden / fade-out start state.
opacity.5: Barely visible tint. Hover overlays on subtle elements.
opacity.10: Light overlay. Hover/pressed states for ghost buttons.
opacity.90: Almost solid. Press states on dark backgrounds.
space.256: Maximum vertical breathing room. Use sparingly.
font.size.11: Font size 11px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.26: Font size 26px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.28: Font size 28px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.32: Font size 32px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.48: Font size 48px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.56: Font size 56px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.lineHeight.34: Line height 34px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
font.lineHeight.36: Line height 36px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
font.lineHeight.40: Line height 40px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
font.lineHeight.52: Line height 52px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
font.lineHeight.64: Line height 64px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
typo.display.xl.size: Display XL — font-size. Large display headline. Hero blocks and feature splashes.
typo.display.xl.lineHeight: Display XL — line-height. Large display headline. Hero blocks and feature splashes.
typo.display.xl.weight: Display XL — font-weight. Large display headline. Hero blocks and feature splashes.
typo.display.xl.letterSpacing: Display XL — letter-spacing. Large display headline. Hero blocks and feature splashes.
elevation.none.offsetY: Elevation none — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Flat — no shadow. Backgrounds and inline content." recipe; compose all elevation/none/* tokens together.
elevation.none.blur: Elevation none — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Flat — no shadow. Backgrounds and inline content." recipe; compose all elevation/none/* tokens together.
elevation.none.spreadRadius: Elevation none — shadow spread. Part of the "Flat — no shadow. Backgrounds and inline content." recipe; compose all elevation/none/* tokens together.
elevation.none.shadowOpacity: Elevation none — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Flat — no shadow. Backgrounds and inline content." recipe; compose all elevation/none/* tokens together.
elevation.none.android: Elevation none — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Flat — no shadow. Backgrounds and inline content." recipe; compose all elevation/none/* tokens together.
elevation.xs.offsetY: Elevation xs — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Subtle lift. Resting cards on tinted backgrounds." recipe; compose all elevation/xs/* tokens together.
elevation.xs.blur: Elevation xs — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Subtle lift. Resting cards on tinted backgrounds." recipe; compose all elevation/xs/* tokens together.
elevation.xs.spreadRadius: Elevation xs — shadow spread. Part of the "Subtle lift. Resting cards on tinted backgrounds." recipe; compose all elevation/xs/* tokens together.
elevation.xs.shadowOpacity: Elevation xs — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Subtle lift. Resting cards on tinted backgrounds." recipe; compose all elevation/xs/* tokens together.
elevation.xs.android: Elevation xs — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Subtle lift. Resting cards on tinted backgrounds." recipe; compose all elevation/xs/* tokens together.
elevation.sm.offsetY: Elevation sm — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Default card shadow. Resting cards on white surfaces." recipe; compose all elevation/sm/* tokens together.
elevation.sm.blur: Elevation sm — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Default card shadow. Resting cards on white surfaces." recipe; compose all elevation/sm/* tokens together.
elevation.sm.spreadRadius: Elevation sm — shadow spread. Part of the "Default card shadow. Resting cards on white surfaces." recipe; compose all elevation/sm/* tokens together.
elevation.sm.shadowOpacity: Elevation sm — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Default card shadow. Resting cards on white surfaces." recipe; compose all elevation/sm/* tokens together.
elevation.sm.android: Elevation sm — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Default card shadow. Resting cards on white surfaces." recipe; compose all elevation/sm/* tokens together.
elevation.md.offsetY: Elevation md — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Hovered cards, dropdowns, popovers." recipe; compose all elevation/md/* tokens together.
elevation.md.blur: Elevation md — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Hovered cards, dropdowns, popovers." recipe; compose all elevation/md/* tokens together.
elevation.md.spreadRadius: Elevation md — shadow spread. Part of the "Hovered cards, dropdowns, popovers." recipe; compose all elevation/md/* tokens together.
elevation.md.shadowOpacity: Elevation md — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Hovered cards, dropdowns, popovers." recipe; compose all elevation/md/* tokens together.
elevation.md.android: Elevation md — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Hovered cards, dropdowns, popovers." recipe; compose all elevation/md/* tokens together.
elevation.lg.offsetY: Elevation lg — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Modals and floating panels." recipe; compose all elevation/lg/* tokens together.
elevation.lg.blur: Elevation lg — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Modals and floating panels." recipe; compose all elevation/lg/* tokens together.
elevation.lg.spreadRadius: Elevation lg — shadow spread. Part of the "Modals and floating panels." recipe; compose all elevation/lg/* tokens together.
elevation.lg.shadowOpacity: Elevation lg — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Modals and floating panels." recipe; compose all elevation/lg/* tokens together.
elevation.lg.android: Elevation lg — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Modals and floating panels." recipe; compose all elevation/lg/* tokens together.
elevation.xl.offsetY: Elevation xl — vertical offset of the shadow. Part of the "Bottom sheets, full overlays." recipe; compose all elevation/xl/* tokens together.
elevation.xl.blur: Elevation xl — shadow blur radius. Part of the "Bottom sheets, full overlays." recipe; compose all elevation/xl/* tokens together.
elevation.xl.spreadRadius: Elevation xl — shadow spread. Part of the "Bottom sheets, full overlays." recipe; compose all elevation/xl/* tokens together.
elevation.xl.shadowOpacity: Elevation xl — opacity of the shadow color. Part of the "Bottom sheets, full overlays." recipe; compose all elevation/xl/* tokens together.
elevation.xl.android: Elevation xl — Android elevation dp value. Part of the "Bottom sheets, full overlays." recipe; compose all elevation/xl/* tokens together.
zIndex.base: Base content layer (z=0). Default page content.
zIndex.raised: Slightly raised (cards on hover, drag previews).
zIndex.banner: Top-of-page system banners and announcement bars.
zIndex.tooltip: Tooltips — always on top of content.
zIndex.max: Reserved top layer for critical UI (e.g. error boundaries). Use sparingly.
motion.duration.instant: 0ms — apply changes immediately, no transition. Use for dragging.
motion.duration.fastest: ~75ms — micro feedback like checkbox flips and ripples.
motion.duration.fast: ~150ms — buttons, hover states, small UI feedback.
motion.duration.normal: ~200ms — default transition. Inputs, dropdowns, tab swaps.
motion.duration.slow: ~400ms — page-level transitions and large surface morphs.
motion.scale.pressed: Scale-down on tap (e.g. 0.97). Apply to button press feedback.
motion.scale.cardPressed: Subtle card-press scale. Tappable list items and large cards.
motion.scale.bounceIn: Overshoot scale for celebratory entries (badges earned, success modals).
motion.opacity.hidden: Fully hidden (0). Use for fade-out start.
motion.opacity.visible: Fully visible (1). Use for fade-in end.
motion.spring.damping.stiff: Spring damping (stiff): snappy, minimal bounce — UI feedback.
motion.spring.damping.default: Spring damping (default): balanced default — most transitions.
motion.spring.damping.gentle: Spring damping (gentle): soft and slow — drawers, sheets.
motion.spring.damping.bouncy: Spring damping (bouncy): pronounced overshoot — playful celebrations.
motion.spring.stiffness.stiff: Spring stiffness (stiff): snappy, minimal bounce — UI feedback.
motion.spring.stiffness.default: Spring stiffness (default): balanced default — most transitions.
motion.spring.stiffness.gentle: Spring stiffness (gentle): soft and slow — drawers, sheets.
motion.spring.stiffness.bouncy: Spring stiffness (bouncy): pronounced overshoot — playful celebrations.
motion.spring.mass.default: Spring mass (default): balanced default — most transitions.
content.selected: Text inside a selected row, chip, or tab.
color.gradient.header.start: Header gradient stop "start". Used in the page-header gradient recipe; do not use directly outside that gradient.
color.gradient.header.mid: Header gradient stop "mid". Used in the page-header gradient recipe; do not use directly outside that gradient.
color.gradient.header.end: Header gradient stop "end". Used in the page-header gradient recipe; do not use directly outside that gradient.
color.gradient.header.accent: Header gradient stop "accent". Used in the page-header gradient recipe; do not use directly outside that gradient.
color.gradient.header.cyan: Header gradient stop "cyan". Used in the page-header gradient recipe; do not use directly outside that gradient.
border.error: Error border. Apply to invalid inputs and danger cards.
typo.display.2xl.size: Display 2XL — font-size. Marketing display headline (largest). Hero/landing only.
typo.display.2xl.lineHeight: Display 2XL — line-height. Marketing display headline (largest). Hero/landing only.
typo.display.2xl.weight: Display 2XL — font-weight. Marketing display headline (largest). Hero/landing only.
typo.display.2xl.letterSpacing: Display 2XL — letter-spacing. Marketing display headline (largest). Hero/landing only.
font.size.84: Font size 84px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.size.96: Font size 96px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/size, not directly.
font.lineHeight.92: Line height 92px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
font.lineHeight.100: Line height 100px. Primitive — reference via typo/{role}/{tier}/lineHeight.
elevation.depth.0: Flat — no elevation. Resting page content.
elevation.depth.-1: Inset depth. Pressed buttons and grooved containers.
color.opacity.5: 5% black overlay primitive. Compose with surface tokens for scrims, dim layers, and resting hover states.
color.opacity.10: 10% black overlay primitive. Compose with surface tokens for scrims, dim layers, and resting hover states.
color.opacity.20: 20% black overlay primitive. Compose with surface tokens for scrims, dim layers, and resting hover states.
color.opacity.50: 50% black overlay primitive. Compose with surface tokens for scrims, dim layers, and resting hover states.
color.opacity.75: 75% black overlay primitive. Compose with surface tokens for scrims, dim layers, and resting hover states.
icon.tertiary: Tertiary icon color. Pairs with content/tertiary and decorative icons.
icon.primary: Primary icon color. Pairs with content/primary text.
icon.secondary: Secondary icon color. Pairs with content/secondary.
